message:
feat: add fleet_memory_controller unifying 5 memory subsystems (ft-iehgn.3)

Introduces FleetMemoryController that aggregates signals from backpressure,
memory_pressure, memory_budget, scrollback_tiers, and resize_memory_controls
into a unified FleetPressureTier (Normal/Elevated/Critical/Emergency) with
coordinated action dispatch and hysteresis-based state transitions.

30 inline tests covering tier mapping, serde roundtrips, escalation/
de-escalation hysteresis, action recommendations, audit trail, and a
200-pane stress scenario.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
